title: EaseMyTrip is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Senior)

jsonLd.title: EaseMyTrip is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Guest Relations Manager with drive and ambition, EaseMyTrip in Coimbatore is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About EaseMyTrip:
EaseMyTrip is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in PMS Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with EaseMyTrip!
